diff: Ten percent (10%) of Step 1 Capital is allocated to the Fortification Foundation, covering legal defense, resilience, unquantifiable risk management, and protocol development and growth. See [A.2.13.1.2 - Fortification Foundation Grants](ec2ebbba-6944-44cb-a04d-4572c6bea1e7). Until the Fortification Foundation is fully operational, this allocation may be directed to the Sky Frontier Foundation on an interim basis.
summary: Add Grove Foundation Grant Authorization For Q2 2026
description: Adds a grant authorization of 800,000 USDS per month to the Grove Foundation from Grove's Prime Treasury for Q2 2026.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
